governing_law.value: Laws of the State of New York
governing_law.exact_text: This Consulting Agreement shall be governed by, and construed pursuant to the laws of the State of New York, applicable to agreements made and performed wholly within such State.

fields.payment_terms: A cash pre-payment of US$150,000; 100,000 Shares upon execution; 50,000 Common Stock options; 100,000 RSA's that vest immediately
